subject: FW: Weinstein Starburst Chandelier Photos
body:
I found this chandalier that closely resembles the one that was lost/stolen
from PB...I will submit this for a claim from insurance
------ Forwarded Message
From: Dana <dana@ellmax.com>
Date: Fri, 23 May 2008 15:06:24 -0400
To: Gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com>
Subject: Fw: Fwd: Weinstein Starburst Chandelier Photos




----- Original Message -----
From: BZRBZR@aol.com <BZRBZR@aol.com>
To: Dana
Sent: Fri May 23 15:05:28 2008
Subject: Fwd: Weinstein Starburst Chandelier Photos

Hello,

We are asking $50,000 for the Dore Bronze mounted Crystal Starburst
Chandelier by C.J. Weinstein.  Ms. Maxwell's price would be $42,000.  Thank
you for your interest.

Regards,

Nora & John Knight

Bizarre Bazaar Ltd.
130 1/4 East 65th Street
New York, N.Y. 10065

Tel: 212-517-2100
Fax: 212-517-2283

Email: BZRBZR@aol.com
www.BZRBZR.com
